name: CAL-MAINE FOODS INC
summary: Cal-Maine Foods, Inc. is a producer and distributor of shell eggs. The company operates through multiple subsidiaries across states including Texas, Arkansas, Mississippi, Georgia, and others. Its subsidiaries are involved in egg production, egg products processing, real estate, insurance, and food products including Crepini-branded items. Cal-Maine holds 100% ownership in most subsidiaries and 51% in Crepini Foods, LLC.

products.name: Shell Eggs
products.description: Core product produced and distributed through multiple regional subsidiaries.

products.name: American Egg Products
products.description: Processed egg products produced via Georgia-based subsidiary.

products.name: Texas Egg Products
products.description: Egg products produced via Texas-based subsidiary.

products.name: Crepini Foods
products.description: Food products produced through 51%-owned Delaware subsidiary.
